Contents 
  1. Description

Interface ProblemReport

All Known Implementing Classes:
Conflict, DifferentReturnTypeOverwrite, Equivalence, FinalOverwrite, Identity, IllegalInterfaceMember, IllegalName, MissingSources, MissingTypeDeclarations, MorePrivateOverwrite, NameConflict, NonStaticOverwrite, NoProblem, PrepareStatementList.IllegalParentContext, Problem, RenameMethod.MissingMethodDeclarations, UncoveredExceptionsOverwrite
public interface ProblemReport
Problem report returned by the analysis phase of a Transformation. The problem report can be used for interactions. This interface should not be subclassed directly, instead one of NoProblemor Problem.
See Also:
  • Transformation.execute()
  • TwoPassTransformation.analyze()
